name: IdeaFormer IR3 V2 0.4 nozzle
machine_start_gcode:
; === IdeaFormer IR3 V2 Belt Printer Start ===
; Axes: X=lateral, Y=gantry height (probe), Z=belt
G90 ; absolute positioning
M82 ; absolute extruder
G21 ; millimeters
G28 ; home all axes
G1 Y20 F500 ; lift nozzle 20mm from belt
; Bed + hotend temps come from the active filament profile. Belt PLA requires 75 C bed — use Generic/eSun PLA @IdeaFormer IR3 V2 filament presets to get it automatically.
M140 S[hot_plate_temp_initial_layer] ; set bed temp
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] ; hotend temp
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] ; wait hotend
M190 S[hot_plate_temp_initial_layer] ; wait bed
; --- Purge blob ---
G92 E0 ; zero extruder
G1 Y.1 ; nozzle 0.1mm above belt
G1 E15 F1000 ; purge 15mm blob
G1 Z20 E25 F800 ; belt advance 20mm + extrude
G1 E23 ; retract 2mm
G28 Y ; re-probe belt surface
G1 E25 ; de-retract
; --- Prime lines (full 250mm bed width) ---
FMS_on ; filament motion sensor
G1 X250 E50 F2000 ; prime line 1
G92 Z0 ; reset belt origin
G1 Z.4 ; belt advance 0.4mm
G1 X0 E75 ; prime line 2
G1 F1000 ; default feedrate
G92 E0 Z0 ; zero extruder + belt = print origin
machine_end_gcode:
; === IdeaFormer IR3 V2 Belt Printer End ===
M400 ; wait for moves to finish
M104 S0 ; heater off
M140 S0 ; bed off
G92 E0 ; zero extruder
G1 E-5 F300 ; retract 5mm
G4 P5000 ; wait for ooze
G91 ; relative mode - keep every end move relative on a belt
G1 Y20 F1000 ; raise gantry 20mm for clearance over the part
G1 Z676 F3000 ; advance belt one full machine-depth to eject the part and clean the belt
G90 ; back to absolute
G28 X ; home X only - NEVER 'G28' all: that homes Z/belt and reverses the whole print back into the gantry
FMS_off ; filament motion sensor off
BED_MESH_CLEAR
M84 ; disable motors
layer_change_gcode: G92 E0 ; belt: reset extruder at layer change (relative E)
